title: ctenitis ursina
intro: Ctenitis ursina, also known as Bear's Paw Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis ursina include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Ctenitis ursina can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
